menu.hintTypeSlash: Type / to open the available commands for this screen.
menu.hintSlashOnly: Commands in this shell start with /. Try /install, /doctor, or /mcp.
menu.hintNoMatches: No commands match the current slash query.

home.title: Visual terminal hub
home.subtitle: Type / to open commands. The shell stays minimal until you choose a path.
home.commandBarIntro: Claude-style entry point: no open menu by default. Type / to reveal the command list.
home.installDescription: Open the guided install hub for destinations, skills, bundles, and updates.
home.catalogDescription: Search families, variants, and bundles before you install anything.
home.servicesDescription: Open runtime launchers for MCP, API, Web, and A2A with guided configuration.
home.settingsDescription: Change theme, language, compact mode, and screen reader preferences.
home.diagnosticsDescription: Run doctor, smoke checks, and inspect local health before publishing.
home.exitDescription: Leave the visual shell without running anything.
home.hintTypeSlash: Type / to open the top-level commands for this shell.
home.hintSlashOnly: Commands in this shell start with /. Try /install, /catalog, or /services.
home.hintNoMatches: No slash command matches the current query. Try /install, /catalog, /services, /settings, or /diagnostics.
home.footer: Type / to browse • ↑/↓ suggestions • Tab autocomplete • Enter open • Esc clear • Ctrl+C exit

settings.title: Visual shell settings
settings.subtitle: Persisted locally in the CLI state file so the shell comes back the same way next time.
settings.compactDescription: Narrow the shell layout for smaller terminals.
settings.screenReaderDescription: Cycle between auto, forced on, and forced off.
settings.screenReaderOnDescription: Prefer text-first rendering and explicit labels.
settings.footer: ↑/↓ move • Enter select • Esc back • Ctrl+C exit

detail.emptyText: Move through the list to inspect the highlighted item.
detail.continueHint: Continue in the left pane to populate this detail view.

menuScreen.footerWithBack: ↑/↓ move • Enter select • Esc back • Ctrl+C exit

textPrompt.typeAndPressEnter: Type a value and press Enter.
textPrompt.footerWithBack: Type and press Enter • Esc back • Ctrl+C exit
textPrompt.footerNoBack: Type and press Enter • Ctrl+C exit

catalog.title: Catalog explorer
catalog.subtitle: Search published families and bundles before you install anything.
catalog.footer: Type to search • Tab switch pane • Enter select • F favorite • Esc home
catalog.searchBlankHint: Leave the query blank to browse top picks.
catalog.pressTab: Press Tab to move from search to results.
catalog.emptyHint: Try broader terms or switch to bundles.
